questionText: Which parts of the steel value chain does your organization operate in?
questionKo: 귀사는 steel 가치사슬의 어느 단계에서 운영합니까?
simpleHelp: CDP aims to deliver a more focused questionnaire for organizations that operate in the steel value chain. Based on your response to this question, you will receive questions that are most relevant to your organization, which should simplify the process of reporting. Answers given here allow investors and data users to more accurately compare responses across organizations and industries.
baseOptions: Blast furnace and basic oxygen furnace operations

guidance.textKo: 일반 As a producer of steel, you 해야 합니다 select 최소 one 의 following 철강 가치사슬 production activities/options above: Blast furnace 및 basic oxygen furnace operations; Electric arc furnace operations; Direct reduced iron operations, or; Open Hearth furnace operations. You 해야 합니다 select all activities that occur inside your 조직경계. 만약 the only coal 귀사 mines is thermal coal for use outside the steel sector, then you 해야 합니다 not select coal mining. Similarly, for all other mining, quarrying, 또는 production of raw materials, 만약 the raw material is not intended 에 대한 steel industry, then it is not 해당되는 경우. Production of raw materials for sale 또는 own consumption is 해당되는 경우.

criteria.criteria:
Any option selected - 4 points
A maximum of 4/4 points is available for this question.
criteria.criteriaKo: 선택지가 하나라도 선택된 경우 - 4 점 이 문항에서 획득 가능한 최고점은 4/4점입니다.
